commands.review_summary:
This PR replaces selected build utility `node --import tsx` invocations in `scripts/build-all.mjs` and `package.json` with native `node --experimental-strip-types`.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main still routes the targeted build utility scripts through `node --import tsx`; running the CI artifact build under Node 26 with trace deprecations is the high-confidence reproduction path for the reported warning.
